2606.13513.title: CloudCons: A Comprehensive End-to-End Benchmark for Cloud Resource Consolidation
2606.13513.paper_summary: Driven by conservative over-provisioning to guarantee service reliability, resource utilization in cloud data centers remains at low levels. To mitigate this, the forecast-then-optimize paradigm has emerged to optimize consolidation by anticipating future demands. While emerging time series foundation models promise to enhance this paradigm through zero-shot generalization, existing benchmarks focus solely on prediction error metrics. The actual decision utility of these advanced models remains unverified, rendering their practical value for downstream tasks uncertain. To bridge this gap, we propose CloudCons, a comprehensive end-to-end benchmark designed to evaluate forecasting models within the specific context of cloud resource consolidation. We build high-quality datasets that cover diverse workloads from Huawei Cloud, Microsoft Azure, and Google Borg, capturing distinct service characteristics ranging from synchronized diurnal rhythms to stochastic, pulse-like bursts and high-frequency noise. We conduct an extensive evaluation of statistical, deep learning, and foundation models. Our experiments reveal a pivotal finding: while foundation models demonstrate superior zero-shot forecasting accuracy, this advantage does not inherently translate into better decision utility. Of practical significance, we systematically analyze how the selection of predictive quantiles acts as a critical lever. We provide actionable guidelines for calibrating these selections to balance the trade-off between resource efficiency and service reliability, offering vital insights for real-world deployment decisions.
2606.13513.paper_summary_zh: 因為保守的過度配置以保證服務可靠性，雲端數據中心的資源利用率仍然維持在低水平。為了緩解這一問題，預測後優化的範式應運而生，通過預測未來需求來優化整合。雖然新興的時間序列基礎模型承諾通過零樣本泛化來增強這一範式，但現有的基準僅專注於預測誤差指標。這些先進模型的實際決策效用仍未得到驗證，使其在下游任務中的實際價值變得不確定。為了填補這一空白，我們提出了CloudCons，一個全面的端到端基準，旨在評估在雲資源整合特定背景下的預測模型。我們建立了高質量的數據集，涵蓋來自華為雲、微軟Azure和Google Borg的多樣化工作負載，捕捉從同步的日夜節律到隨機的脈衝式爆發和高頻噪聲等不同服務特徵。我們對統計、深度學習和基礎模型進行了廣泛的評估。我們的實驗揭示了一個關鍵發現：雖然基礎模型顯示出卓越的零樣本預測準確性，但這一優勢並不自動轉化為更好的決策效用。具有實際意義的是，我們系統地分析了預測分位數的選擇如何作為一個關鍵槓桿。我們提供了可操作的指導方針，以調整這些選擇，以平衡資源效率和服務可靠性之間的權衡，為現實世界的部署決策提供重要見解。
2606.13513.author: Xiaobin Zhang et.al.
2606.13513.authors: Xiaobin Zhang, Lefei Shen, Mouxiang Chen, Zhuo Li, Hongkai Li, Han Fu, Jianling Sun, Xiaoxue Ren, Chenghao Liu
